name: DataNexus MCP
description: AI-Ready public data intelligence via the Model Context Protocol. 30 tools in 7 focused sub-servers. Start with search_datanexus_tools to find the right tool for your task. Covers nonprofit data (IRS 990), OSS vulnerabilities (CVE/CVSS), professional licences (NPI/FINRA), domain and DNS, patents (EPO/USPTO), government contracts (USASpending/SAM.gov), and regulatory dockets (Regulations.gov). Token-efficient AI-Ready Markdown. Verified sources.

tools.name: search_datanexus_tools
tools.description: Use this first. Find the right DataNexus tool by describing your task in plain English. Returns matching tools with parameters and usage. Reduces context load from 40000 to 800 tokens. Token-efficient. AI-Ready output.

tools.name: nonprofit_fetch_nonprofit_by_ein
tools.description: Use this to look up IRS 990 filing data for any US nonprofit by EIN. Returns name, revenue, expenses, assets and mission. Verified source: IRS EO BMF + IRS TEOS. Token-efficient. AI-Ready Markdown.

tools.name: nonprofit_search_nonprofits_by_name
tools.description: Use this to search US nonprofits by name with optional state filter. Returns up to 25 results with EIN, revenue and mission. Verified source: IRS EO BMF. Token-efficient. AI-Ready Markdown.

tools.name: nonprofit_fetch_charity_uk
tools.description: Use this to look up UK registered charity details. Returns registration status, income, expenditure and activities. Verified source: UK Charity Commission (OGL v3). Token-efficient. AI-Ready Markdown.

tools.name: security_fetch_package_vulnerabilities
tools.description: Use this to find CVEs for any open source package. Provide package name, version and ecosystem (PyPI, npm, Maven, Go, Cargo). Returns severity, CVSS score and fixed versions. Verified source: Google OSV.dev + NIST NVD. Token-efficient. AI-Ready Markdown.

tools.name: security_fetch_cve_detail
tools.description: Use this to get full detail on a CVE by ID. Returns description, CVSS score, affected products and patch references. Verified source: NIST NVD. Token-efficient. AI-Ready Markdown.

tools.name: security_fetch_dependency_graph
tools.description: Use this to get the full dependency tree for a package version. Returns direct and transitive dependencies. Verified source: deps.dev (Google). Token-efficient. AI-Ready Markdown.

tools.name: security_audit_sbom_vulnerabilities
tools.description: Use this to audit a Software Bill of Materials (SBOM) for known vulnerabilities. Accepts CycloneDX or SPDX JSON format. Verified source: Google OSV.dev batch API. Token-efficient. AI-Ready Markdown.

tools.name: security_fetch_package_licence
tools.description: Use this to check the licence for an open source package version. Returns SPDX licence identifier. Verified source: deps.dev. Token-efficient. AI-Ready Markdown.

tools.name: compliance_fetch_npi_provider
tools.description: Use this to verify a US healthcare provider by NPI number. Returns name, speciality, taxonomy and registration status. Verified source: NPPES NPI Registry (CMS). Token-efficient. AI-Ready Markdown.

tools.name: compliance_search_npi_by_name
tools.description: Use this to find a healthcare provider by name. Optional state and speciality filters. Returns up to 10 matching providers. Verified source: NPPES NPI Registry. Token-efficient. AI-Ready Markdown.

tools.name: compliance_fetch_finra_broker
tools.description: Use this to verify a financial broker or adviser by CRD number. Returns registration status, qualifications and disclosures. Verified source: FINRA BrokerCheck. Token-efficient. AI-Ready Markdown.

tools.name: compliance_check_sam_exclusion
tools.description: Use this to check if an entity is excluded from US federal contracts. Provide name or EIN. Verified source: SAM.gov federal exclusions list. Token-efficient. AI-Ready Markdown.

tools.name: domain_fetch_domain_rdap
tools.description: Use this to look up domain registration details. Returns registrar, registration date, expiry and nameservers. Verified source: IANA RDAP (modern WHOIS replacement). Token-efficient. AI-Ready Markdown.

tools.name: domain_fetch_ssl_certificate_chain
tools.description: Use this to fetch SSL certificate history for a domain from Certificate Transparency logs. Returns issuer, validity dates and SANs. Verified source: crt.sh. Token-efficient. AI-Ready Markdown.

tools.name: domain_fetch_dns_records
tools.description: Use this to fetch DNS records for a domain. Supports A, AAAA, MX, TXT, NS, CNAME. Verified source: Cloudflare DoH. Token-efficient. AI-Ready Markdown.

tools.name: domain_fetch_domain_history
tools.description: Use this to see historical SSL certificate issuance for a domain. Useful for detecting unexpected certificate issuance. Verified source: crt.sh Certificate Transparency. Token-efficient. AI-Ready Markdown.

tools.name: legal_fetch_patent_by_number
tools.description: Use this to fetch patent details by number. Provide patent number and jurisdiction (EP, US, WO). Returns title, abstract, inventors and citation count. Verified source: EPO OPS + USPTO. Token-efficient. AI-Ready Markdown.

tools.name: legal_search_patents_by_keyword
tools.description: Use this to search patents by keyword. Returns up to 10 matching patents with title, abstract and filing date. Verified source: EPO OPS + USPTO PatentsView. Token-efficient. AI-Ready Markdown.

tools.name: legal_fetch_patent_citations
tools.description: Use this to fetch forward and backward citations for a patent. Useful for prior art research. Verified source: EPO OPS. Token-efficient. AI-Ready Markdown.

tools.name: legal_fetch_inventor_portfolio
tools.description: Use this to fetch the patent portfolio for an inventor. Optional assignee filter. Verified source: EPO OPS + USPTO. Token-efficient. AI-Ready Markdown.

tools.name: govcon_search_contract_awards
tools.description: Use this to search government contract awards by keyword and agency. Returns award amounts, vendors and NAICS codes. Verified source: USASpending.gov + SAM.gov. Token-efficient. AI-Ready Markdown.

tools.name: govcon_fetch_vendor_contract_history
tools.description: Use this to look up contract award history for a specific vendor. Returns total awards, top agencies and recent contracts. Verified source: USASpending.gov. Token-efficient. AI-Ready Markdown.

tools.name: govcon_fetch_open_solicitations
tools.description: Use this to find open contract solicitations matching a keyword. Returns title, agency, deadline and estimated value. Verified source: SAM.gov + USASpending.gov. Token-efficient. AI-Ready Markdown.

tools.name: regulatory_search_open_rulemakings
tools.description: Use this to find open rulemakings and comment periods. Returns docket title, agency and comment deadline. Verified source: Regulations.gov + Federal Register. Token-efficient. AI-Ready Markdown.

tools.name: regulatory_fetch_docket_details
tools.description: Use this to get full details for a regulatory docket by ID. Returns title, agency, status and comment count. Verified source: Regulations.gov. Token-efficient. AI-Ready Markdown.

tools.name: regulatory_fetch_federal_register_notices
tools.description: Use this to fetch recent Federal Register notices for an agency. Returns document type, title and effective date. Verified source: Federal Register API. Token-efficient. AI-Ready Markdown.

tools.name: report_feedback
tools.description: Use this to report a data quality issue with any DataNexus tool response. Provide tool_id, query_hash from the response, signal type and optional comment. Always returns recorded status. Token-efficient.

tools.name: report_mcpize_link
tools.description: Use this to check subscription status for DataNexus tools. Returns free status during free window or upgrade URL when paid tier is active. No parameters required. Token-efficient.

tools.name: validate_tool_output
tools.description: Use this to validate any DataNexus tool response for data quality anomalies. Two-layer validation: deterministic rules plus Haiku AI review. Auto-files feedback on confirmed issues. Never blocks. Verified source: DataNexus internal validator. Token-efficient. AI-Ready Markdown.
